tags.wheelchair:description: The main section of café is wheelchair accessible and tables are a user-friendly height. Disabled parking is 350m away and disabled toilet 30m from café, both are accessible by a concrete pathway. Service counter is high but accessible with difficulty.

tags.name: Darwin's
tags.wheelchair:description: Darwins is wheelchair accessible with a clear path to the counter through an automatic sliding glass door. The counter is too high however and makes ordering difficult.

tags.name: UQ Union Physiol Eatery & Cafe
tags.wheelchair:description: Path from closest car park to Physiology Refectory is steep & lacks landings. Refectory service counter is high - difficult to order/collect food. Entrance & path in/around Refectory is accessible. Accessible unisex, spacious toilet close to Refectory.

tags.wheelchair:description: No accessible parking. Footpath from street parking very steep. Closest wheelchair accessible toilet 1 block away. Step up to entrance 12cm. Tight space between tables makes it hard to reach counter. Easily reshuffled providing cafe not busy.

tags.name: Max Brenner Chocolate Bar
tags.wheelchair:description: Threshold ramp at entrance. Clearance underneath tables and counter for wheelchair access. Generally spacious expect at chocolate display and pillar at center of cafe. Public toilet within 20m and wheelchair accessible carpark in 210m
